previous_loop: V13 v0.2 was published, V13 LoopKit was created, self-application was recorded, the announcement-post decision was capped, and the announcement post was published.
residue: V12 to V13 handoff discipline exists

next_variable: Real-task proof: test whether V13 LoopKit helps decide one concrete next action after AI-assisted work.

re_entry_capacity.notes: Re-entry capacity is preserved if the operator returns to private/prototype proof and avoids public reaction-chasing.

cap_or_recheck: Run exactly one real-task proof. Do not post follow-up explanations within 48 hours, add new features, broaden promotion, or treat public reaction as the main evaluation. Recheck after one real task has been reviewed using the V13 prompt.
next_loop_command: Use V13 LoopKit on one concrete AI-assisted task completion and record whether the gate output was useful, unclear, too heavy, or wrong.
